chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-6301 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge Directions. 1. For hearing of CMA No.16270/2023. 2. For hearing of CMA No.16271/2023. 27.01.2026. Mr. Hafeezullah, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Tauqeer Ahmed, Advocate for the Respondents. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. ----- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner to pursue the listed Applications. A perusal of the Order Sheet reflects that this was also the case on the previous date. Under such circumstances, the listed Applications stand dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
